subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! How can I recount that which Thou hast bestowed upon me through Thy bounty and conferred upon me through Thy grace, whereby Thou hast guided me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی کیف اذکر ما اعطیتنی بجودک و اکرمتنی بفضلک بحیث هدیتنی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
